hero.title: What our customers say
hero.intro: Real reviews from dog owners in Kidderminster and across Worcestershire.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: My Labrador has been coming to K9 Leisure Club for over a year and she absolutely loves it. The team know her by name, they update me through the day, and she comes home happily exhausted. Couldn't ask for more.

reviews.name: James R.
reviews.text: Our elderly Spaniel was really struggling after his knee surgery. The hydrotherapy sessions have made a remarkable difference to his mobility and confidence in the water. The therapists are knowledgeable, gentle, and genuinely care about the dogs.

reviews.name: Claire H.
reviews.text: Best groomer we have ever used. Our Golden Retriever always looks incredible after a visit. The team take their time, never rush him, and he comes back smelling amazing. Already booked in for next month!

reviews.name: Tom & Lucy W.
reviews.text: We treated our Cockapoo to the full spa package as a birthday treat and she was absolutely pampered. The staff were brilliant with her and the result was stunning. 100% recommend the spa treatments.

reviews.name: Abi K.
reviews.text: I was nervous about leaving my rescue dog for the first time but the team were incredibly patient. They did a settling-in visit first and made sure she was comfortable before joining the group. She now trots in happily every week.

reviews.name: Mark D.
reviews.text: Our vet recommended hydrotherapy for our dog's hip dysplasia and K9 Leisure Club have been fantastic. The underwater treadmill sessions are already showing results. Professional, friendly, and flexible with appointments.

reviews.name: Natalie F.
reviews.text: I have tried a few groomers in the area and this is by far the best. They listened to exactly what I wanted, my Westie looks perfect, and the price was really reasonable. Will not be going anywhere else.

reviews.name: Dave & Elaine P.
reviews.text: Our two Border Collies are full of energy and K9 Leisure Club handles them brilliantly. Plenty of space, great outdoor areas, and staff who clearly love dogs. Can't recommend it enough.

reviews.name: Jodie L.
reviews.text: My French Bulldog loves the swim sessions. She used to be terrified of water but the team built her confidence gradually over several visits. Now she jumps straight in! Brilliant facilities and caring staff.

cta.heading: Ready to book?
cta.text: Join hundreds of happy dogs and their owners at K9 Leisure Club.
